name: rpn32-monorepo
description: A terminal RPN calculator inspired by the HP 32SII

scripts.clean: npm run clean -w @brnwb/rpn32-core && npm run clean -w @brnwb/rpn32
scripts.build: npm run build -w @brnwb/rpn32-core && npm run build -w @brnwb/rpn32
scripts.dev: npm run build -w @brnwb/rpn32-core && npm run dev -w @brnwb/rpn32
scripts.check: npm run format:check && npm run lint && npm run build && npm run test
